moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Aftermath
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final took place yesterday, July 19th, bringing the month-long global football tournament to a dramatic close.

angles.name: Final Whistle
angles.copy: The World Cup final whistle blew yesterday, ending a month of incredible football. What was your tournament highlight?

angles.name: Tournament Wrap
angles.copy: From stunning goals to nail-biting finishes, the FIFA World Cup 2026 has delivered. We're already missing it!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman', turns 79 today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! Which of his timeless tracks is your absolute favourite?

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Carlos Santana, who turns 79 today! His guitar riffs are truly legendary.

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday Kim Carnes
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, best known for her iconic 1981 hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday today.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the distinctive voice behind 'Bette Davis Eyes', Kim Carnes! Still sounds incredible today.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Kim Carnes! What's your favourite track from this 80s legend?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart #1 Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week has been announced, with Billie Eilish's 'New Track Title' taking the coveted number one spot.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: It's official: Billie Eilish has landed the UK's Number 1 single with 'New Track Title'! Tune in to hear the new chart-topper.

angles.name: New Music Friday Aftermath
angles.copy: Did your favourite new release hit the top? The latest UK Singles Chart is out, and it's Billie Eilish at Number 1!

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, the legendary British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic Cat Stevens! What's your all-time favourite song from him?

angles.name: Morning Has Broken
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate the enduring music of Cat Stevens, who turns 78 tomorrow! His timeless songs continue to inspire.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, the legendary singer-songwriter and drummer for The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday this Wednesday.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: A very happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite track he's lent his voice to?

angles.name: Hotel California Hitmaker
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Don Henley turns 79 on Wednesday. From The Eagles to his solo work, his music is unforgettable.

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Selena Gomez, known for hits like 'Lose You To Love Me' and her acting career, turns 34 this Wednesday.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the incredible Selena Gomez, who turns 34 this Wednesday! What's your top Selena track?

angles.name: Gomez at 34
angles.copy: Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday this Wednesday! From Disney to global hits, she's done it all.

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Saul Hudson, better known as the iconic Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash, famous for his distinctive top hat and incredible riffs, turns 61 this Thursday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary Slash this Thursday! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses solo from the guitar hero?

angles.name: Top Hat Icon
angles.copy: Ready to shred into his 61st! Slash celebrates his birthday on Thursday. His riffs defined a generation.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off This Weekend
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 is set to kick off this Friday, July 24th, at Henham Park, Suffolk, bringing major headliners and arts to the UK.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just days away! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park this weekend?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Henham Park in Suffolk is buzzing! Latitude Festival kicks off Friday with a huge weekend of music, comedy, and arts.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global icon Jennifer Lopez, celebrated for her music, acting, and dance, turns 57 this Friday.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: This Friday, the one and only Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday! What's your favourite J.Lo anthem?

angles.name: 57 & Fabulous
angles.copy: From the block to global superstar, Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on Friday! Her impact on music, film, and fashion is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The incomparable frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: This Sunday, the one and only Mick Jagger turns 83! What's your go-to Rolling Stones anthem?

angles.name: Jagger at 83
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this weekend. Here's to the rock legend!

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary drummer and songwriter Roger Taylor will celebrate his 77th birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: This Sunday, Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor! Which of his songs do you love most?

angles.name: Radio Ga Ga Hitmaker
angles.copy: Celebrating the powerhouse behind Queen's rhythm, Roger Taylor, who turns 77 this weekend! A true rock icon.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The latest season of Love Island UK continues to deliver daily drama, romance, and unexpected twists from the villa, keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's your favourite couple (or biggest talking point) right now?

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Get ready for tonight's Love Island! What do you predict will happen in the villa after last night's bombshell?

moments.title: Happy 68th Birthday Kate Bush
moments.blurb: Influential and enigmatic singer-songwriter Kate Bush, known for 'Wuthering Heights' and 'Running Up That Hill', turns 68 next Thursday.

angles.name: Iconic Kate Bush
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we celebrate the unique genius of Kate Bush, who turns 68! What's your favourite track from her incredible catalogue?

angles.name: Running Up That Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to send birthday wishes to the legendary Kate Bush, turning 68 next Thursday! Her music truly transcends time.
